attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.TIME_BUILDING_BLOCK_ID, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.TYPE_, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.MEASURE, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.UNIT_OF_MEASURE, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.START_TIME, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.STOP_TIME, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.PARENT_BUILDING_BLOCK_ID, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.PARENT_BUILDING_BLOCK_OVN, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.SCOPE, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.APPROVAL_STATUS, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.RESOURCE_ID, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.RESOURCE_TYPE, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.APPROVAL_STYLE_ID, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.DATE_FROM, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.DATE_TO, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.COMMENT_TEXT, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.APPLICATION_SET_ID, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.DATA_SET_ID, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.TRANSLATION_DISPLAY_KEY, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS,
 (
select TIME_BUILDING_BLOCK_ID,OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS
minus
select TIME_BUILDING_BLOCK_ID,OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS
) ACM
where 
 ACM.TIME_BUILDING_BLOCK_ID = STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.TIME_BUILDING_BLOCK_ID and ACM.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER = STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_HXC_TIME_BUILDING_BLOCKS)
